title: Chapter 12
content:
Chapter 12

I let my mana flow through my entire body. Strangely, I didn’t find any blockades in that circulation. Now, usually, when a newbie circulated any kind of cosmic power, he would also get rid of the filth that had been built up in his body since his childhood.

However, in Jack’s body, I found none. The mana flowed so smoothly throughout the body that if someone told me that weekly body cleansing was being done on Jack’s body, I would believe them in a heartbeat.

Maybe that was precisely what was happening.

But if it wasn’t, then this was some body.

Anyway, other than that, the important thing I found was the construction of vessels. The construction, or should I say the entire biology of this body, was constructed in such a way that no vessels were providing blood to my genitals except for the urinary vessels.

So it meant that the urinary vessels were intact and doing what they needed to do, but the other vessels weren’t. And it wasn’t like they were severed or anything, they were just not going through that area. It meant it was made that way since birth.

Upon further circulations, I figured that the vessels were there, it was just that they weren’t going through the area and doing what they were supposed to do; enlarge my dick and provide me with pleasure.

So with the vessels constructed that way, I had two options at my disposal. One, use mana to do what the vessels couldn’t do. Construct temporary vessels to allow blood flow to my penis and connect them with my testicles for full structure.

It would be a temporary measure because it would consume a lot of mana for something like that. And the longer I went, the more mana would be consumed. The kind of mana I didn’t have right now.

The second, and the long-term solution, would be body reconstruction. Now with Ki, body reconstruction was possible when one reached a certain level.

However, with mana, I have never tried that before. Besides, mana kept a person young-looking anyway, so there was never a need to attempt body reconstruction in my previous life, whereas Ki, no matter how massive, wouldn’t help a person slow down the aging process by that much, so if one wanted to live longer, body reconstruction was a must.

The bottom line was that I didn’t have any experience with mana body reconstruction, and I had never heard of it either. It was true that the mana of this world wasn’t like the mana I was familiar with, but more on the erratic side like Ki, but the function was still the same, and I wasn’t so sure it would work.

Not to mention, I didn’t have the resources and the mana to pull that off.

So, all things considered, I had to go with the temporary option. Also, there was one thing that I had to worry about. The amount of mana I had was way too little to even build one vessel, let alone build almost ten vessels for full sensory fun.

So, only one option was left with that.

A trip to the sewers. Again.

Only this time, I needed to go in there prepared.

~~

The next day was quick to come because I was stuck examining my body the entire day yesterday. So much so that I had to sacrifice my relaxation sessions with girls.

But the subsequent morning, I had the pleasure of witnessing a perfect, bombastic milf, on her knees and cleaning the floor. Now I know it was cliché, but that was how many of the scenes I saw started.

I made my way to her and said, “Mother, can I move your skirt, please?”

She looked at me, raising her body, still on her knees, and asked, “If you want to slap my butt, then you cannot. It does not feel good.”

“I will be gentle this time, mother. Please. It just feels too good.” I said.

She looked at me with a skeptical gaze, but in the end, raised her skirt to allow me a view of her forbidden holes. Her slit, still clean and close like a virgin teen and perky little asshole, clean and pristine, but also closed like it had never been played with.

I doubt she could even contract it on her own because she would be so unfamiliar with it.

Anyway, I moved closer to the buns of sunshine but this time, unlike yesterday, I infused a hundred points of my mana to stimulate her vaginal vessels.

I remember doing this back in the magic world, and although it didn’t provide that great of a stimulation, it did make the spanking pleasurable, which in turn made them addicted to it.

And…

Pah!

Although I didn’t intend to make it painful like yesterday, I didn’t intend to make it soft either. Watching as my hand would dig into that soft pillow as her ass would ripple from the impact was an exotic scene I wasn’t willing to miss.

“Ahhnnn!!!” She bucked her hips and fell on her front as pleasure ran through her body. I could see something wet coming out of her vagina as she fully embraced the doggy position.

I was sure it wouldn’t have hurt as much as it did yesterday, and with mana stimulating her internal vessels, she might have felt even pleasure from that.

“Oooohh!!!”

Spurt.

Spurt.

Small spurts of juices kept escaping her slit but it still didn’t open enough for me to gaze inside.

Anyway, I rubbed her giant ass cheek where I struck her but I didn’t imbue any mana in my hand this time. It was just a warm caressing to show I cared.

“Ahng!”

“Ahnn!”

She still moaned in her position, her pussy still spurting her clear white liquid of pleasure.

“Did it feel good, mother?” I asked.

“Ahn…” she moaned before she replied, “Ye—Yes, it did. Just like you… haa… haa… just like your massage.”

I smiled and said, “I was researching new methods of massaging and I invented this one. This way, I could feel pleasure from hitting your buttocks, and you would not feel pain but instead pleasure.”

“Yes… It does look like you worked hard.” She replied, still remaining in her position while I caressed her ass with my hand to my heart’s content.

[Quest complete]

[EXP +1]

Alas, all good things must come to an end.

I could either enjoy myself here all day, or I could go and increase my level to fix my current predicament and enjoy myself even more.

And to be honest, the choice wasn’t tough at all. Although I felt mental pleasure from seeing her like this, that pleasure would nowhere near what I would feel from the original act of procreation.

With that in mind, I fixed Rayla’s skirt and stood up, leaving her still crouched on the floor, and said, “I will be going to the library now. I will return in the evening.”

I left her in her place, but I didn’t go out. Instead, I headed to the kitchen and took a knife. A kitchen knife that was sharp enough to cut a normal person’s finger off.

It wasn’t a sword, but something was better than nothing. Although it would be difficult, I would still be able to work around the balance of the knife with my experience, and other than that, the dagger arts I knew were far more sophisticated than any other, so there wasn’t any problem in fighting criteria.

Of course, since I said normal people, I didn’t mean it would cut through awakened people, let alone monsters who have inherently tougher skin, so this knife might even be useless against F-rank monsters.

But, for that, I had a trick. It involved mana and endless use of mana, such as the mana crystals in my inventory.

~~

I arrived at the sewer entrance and entered after looking around.

As I entered, the foul smell from yesterday assaulted me again, but no more. I covered my face with a layer of mana.

[Mana -50]

[The used mana state would last ten minutes]

Well, I wasn’t that rich with mana to use one-fourth of my mana pool for just this, so today, I dashed to the middle of the sewer, where I had to run away from yesterday.

After four minutes of running, I finally came across a bunch of rats, but I didn’t slow down in the slightest.

[Mana has been imbued in the chosen weapon]

[Weapon’s durability has increased by 500%]

[Weapon’s sharpness has increased by 500%]

[State would last 10 minutes]

[Mana -100]

[After the state of enhancement ends]

[Your weapon’s durability would fall by 10%]

Slice.

One slice and tens of rats were pierced through and died on the spot.

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x4]

[You have gained 40 EXP]

[You have gained an F rank mana crystal x4]

[You have killed a mutated infected mouse x9]

[You have gained 900 EXP]

[You have gained an E rank mana crystal x9]

[You have leveled up]

[EXP 143\1300]

Let the sweet, sweet hunt begin.

~~
